channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tornado hits Oklahoma, damages 40 homes, shuts roads
item.description: Powerful tornado damages 40 homes in Oklahoma county; emergency crews search.

item.title: U.S. re-arms during ceasefire, raising munitions supply concerns
item.description: Administration projects confidence in munitions stocks, but long-term concerns persist.

item.title: Soldier charged with using classified intel to win $400K on Maduro raid
DOJ to drop criminal probe of Fed Chair Powell amid Senate pressure
item.description: Sources say DOJ may drop Powell investigation by Friday.

item.title: Watch: First look at 2 giant pandas coming to US
item.description: Pandas Ping Ping and Fu Shuang loaned to Zoo Atlanta under new agreement.
